channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Unsightly diseased tree stump, 2nd March
item.description:
This tree stump has still not been removed & the paving made good, despite the Council repeatedly saying they would do so. The Council also assured that replacement trees would be planted?
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cottage Avenue, Bromley Common, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped white cupboard, 2nd March
item.description:
Dumped white cupboard
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Green Lane, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Corner of Aldershot and Priory park rosd, 2nd March
item.description:
People have been using that space as fly tipping paradise. There are wood planks, mattress, broken furniture. Needs to be collected asap. Rubbish attracts rubbish. Also, a camera and a sign would discourage people from doing it again and again
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Priory Park Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Medium - Up to medium size van load

item.title: Severely degraded road surface, 2nd March
item.description:
Various patching has not knitted well together

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Queen Street, Blendon, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Black Abandoned untaxed car nr. Wynford Grove in garage parking area, 2nd March
item.description:
This black car was dumped here 3 months ago. It is untaxed, uninsured and no MOT in about four years ! Black Abandoned car is in garage parking area just of Wynford Grove in St Paul’s Cray.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 45, Saxville Road, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lampost not working, outside 1A, 2nd March
item.description:
Lampost not working, outside 1A
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Nuxley Road, Upper Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Back to TFL !!! Traffic lights required in William Barefoot Drive junction with Green Lane for safety traffic management. Your report has been investigated by our team and this is not the responsibility of Transport for London. However, your local borough will be able to help you. Should you need anything else please contact our customer services team on 0343 222 1234 State changed to: not TfL’s responsibility Unfortunately all traffic Lights in Greater London are the responsibility of Transport For London on behalf of Royal Greenwich Contact Centre, 2nd March
item.description:
Back to TFL !!! Traffic lights required in William Barefoot Drive junction with Green Lane for safety traffic management. Your report has been investigated by our team and this is not the responsibility of Transport for London. However, your local borough will be able to help you. Should you need anything else please contact our customer services team on 0343 222 1234 State changed to: not TfL’s responsibility Unfortunately all traffic Lights in Greater London are the responsibility of Transport For London on behalf of Royal Greenwich Contact Centre
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sidcup Road, New Eltham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:
Street lamp not working outside house number 3.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Grosvenor Road, Upper Belvedere, Greater London

item.title: Damaged road surface, 2nd March
item.description:
Pothole

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 22, Parkhurst Road, Bexley, Greater London

item.title: Silver Abandoned untaxed car nr. Wynford Grove in garage parking area, 2nd March
item.description:
The silver car was dumped here several months ago. It is untaxed, uninsured and no MOT in about four years ! Silver Abandoned car is in garage parking area just of Wynford Grove in St Paul’s Cray.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 45, Saxville Road, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car is parked on a yellow line, 2nd March
item.description:
Car has been parked on a yellow line for 2 weeks , underneath the notice clearly showing the street restriction times, when cars and carpet Lorrie’s are parked opposite it causes a bottleneck

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Martens Avenue, Barnehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole - Watling Street, 2nd March
item.description:
Very large pothole getting worse - opposite the bus stop on Watling street outside 156
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Watling Street, Barnehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped mattress, 2nd March
item.description:
A dumped mattress on Turpington Lane is causing problems for people with prams and people in wheelchairs

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): A21, Bromley Common, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter/rubbish on pavement between 29 - 32 Love Walk Camberwell, 2nd March
item.description:
Rubbish from a black bag and litter is strewn across this section of pavement. Can it please be swept up?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 6, Love Walk, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping on the old building by the carpark, 2nd March
item.description:
This has gone on for weeks! There is already a rat problem here and this makes it worse. Residents of park spring court are particularly affected Foxes, and rats, are pulling it all apart

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Colebrook Street, Slade Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish dump in flower bed oppisite doctor surgery, 2nd March
item.description:
Vile smelling rubbish left in public approx 4 bags

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Godstow Road, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 2 gutters on the small chapel in the old cemetery are completely clogged up with green foliage. Obviously haven't been cleaned out for months, 2nd March
item.description:
This council must have spent thousands of pounds a few years ago restoring this lovely, old building. If the gutters are clogged, the rain water will cascade down the brickwork, causing untold damage to the walls..again. The gutters are SO clogged that they cannot have been cleared out in some time. Please can you arrange for them to be cleared out, or you'll be back to square one & having to restore the fabric if the building yet again. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kingsdale Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned and clamped car has been there for 3 weeks at least, 2nd March
item.description:
Number plates do not match car. Driver's side window wide open. DVLA clamp. Time it was gone before someone sets it alight or vandalises it more.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Wickham Lane, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large pot hole right outside our house, 2nd March
item.description:
Please help to fix. Many thanks
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 25, Minster Road, Sundridge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Trolley, 2nd March
item.description:
Trolley in alley between elmfield park and high st

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elmfield Road, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
